name: session-relay
description: Cross-session, cross-project agent message bus (Claude Code + Codex). A SessionStart hook auto-registers each session and drains its inbox; an MCP server (bus) exposes whoami/register/roster/send/inbox over a shared on-disk store keyed by session id; and a relay CLI wakes an idle target via headless `claude -p --resume` / `codex exec resume`. Skills + hooks + MCP on Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-session/cross-project agent message bus (Claude Code + Codex).
